comments.body: FORCE_CLAIM: plan-review gate bypassed by user approval — no plan-review attestation was verified. Reason: "Post-epic remediation (audit follow-on); implementing now.".

compiled_state.description:
## What
The attested snapshot/fetch process has never run in a GHA runner: no CI workflow invokes the gates live, and no test simulates a GHA-style checkout (detached HEAD, shallow fetch-depth, token-auth https fetch). Known risk points: a shallow clone breaks HEAD~1..HEAD (review-code) and may break ref resolution; private-repo token fetch is unexercised.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] A test (or CI job) exercises materialize/resolve under a shallow + detached-HEAD checkout like GHA's actions/checkout default.
- [ ] The credentialed-fetch path is exercised (token/helper) or its GHA failure mode is asserted + documented.
- [ ] review-code's HEAD~1 dependency on clone depth is documented or handled (e.g. fetch-depth guidance).

file_impact.reason: GHA shallow/detached materialize test + review-code depth limit

compiled_state.title: Test the repo-snapshot process in a GitHub Actions runner environment
